arts.ttl: Can Dani Olmo play for Barcelona in El Clásico against Real Madrid in the Spanish Super Cup?
arts.sum: Barcelona will face El Clásico rivals Real Madrid in a second successive Spanish Super Cup final and have had their roster for the game in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia bolstered by the availability of key attacker Dani Olmo. The RFEF, which runs the Spanish Super Cup as well as the Copa del Rey, had previously stated it “cannot process any licence without prior approval from LaLiga.”

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Supercopa de Espana clash between Real Madrid and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Saudi chief confirms interest in Barcelona stars
arts.sum: Al-Ittihad boss Ramon Planes has confirmed that he is keeping tabs on several Barcelona players after recent links with Raphinha and Frenkie de Jong . However, Al-Ittihad boss Ramon Planes, formerly Barcelona's sporting director, has openly confirmed to Mundo Deportivo that there are several Blaugrana players on his shortlist.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick gives Ronald Araujo verdict amid Arsenal & Juventus links
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has responded to transfer speculation regarding defender Ronald Araujo.

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid - Barcelona? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Real Madrid - Barcelona will be played on Sunday January 12 at King Abdullah Sport City with kick off at 2:00 p.m. ET / 11:00 a.m. PT . Real Madrid had a great month of December, and their win against Mallorca in the semifinal marks the continuation of their form.
